3DMode.label: 3D
3DMode.description: Applies a brightness or alpha gradient across each arm to simulate depth. 3D fades edges, 3D Inverted fades the center, and Sweep applies a directional gradient from one edge to the other.

arms.label: #Arms
arms.description: Number of colored arms radiating from the center of the pinwheel. Each arm uses the next color from the palette.

armSize.label: Size
armSize.description: Length of each arm as a percentage of the maximum radius. Values above 100 extend the arms beyond the model edges.

rotation.label: Rotation
rotation.description: Sets the rotation direction. When checked, the pinwheel spins counter-clockwise; when unchecked, it spins clockwise.

speed.label: Speed
speed.description: Rotation speed of the pinwheel. Higher values make the arms spin faster.

style.label: Style
style.description: Rendering algorithm to use. The new method uses ISPC-accelerated rendering for better performance and fills the entire buffer; the old method draws arms by stepping along radial lines. Existing sequences are migrated to preserve 'Old Render Method' so their look doesn't change.

thickness.label: Thick
thickness.description: Width of each arm as a percentage of the angular space between arms. At 100, adjacent arms touch with no gap between them.

twist.label: Twist
twist.description: Degrees of curvature applied along each arm from center to tip. Positive values twist clockwise, negative values twist counter-clockwise, creating spiral arms.

registryDefinition.notes: High-value radial effect. Strong candidate for star, spinner, and tree profiles where style, arms, rotation, and speed should dominate early screening.

upstream.label: 3D
